policy_expiry.en: Your policy will expire on 31st December.
policy_expiry.hi: Aapki policy 31 December ko expire hogi.

claim_process.en: To raise a claim, please visit our website or contact support.
claim_process.hi: Claim raise karne ke liye website visit karein ya support se baat karein.

customer_care.en: You can contact customer care at 1800-123-456.
customer_care.hi: Aap customer care se 1800-123-456 par sampark kar sakte hain.

update_mobile.en: You can update your mobile number through our app.
update_mobile.hi: Aap app ke through apna mobile number update kar sakte hain.

otp_not_received.en: If OTP was not received, I can resend it.
otp_not_received.hi: Agar OTP nahi aaya, main dobara bhej sakta hoon.

policy_document.en: Your policy document has been sent to your email.
policy_document.hi: Aapka policy document aapke email par bhej diya gaya hai.

greeting.en: Hello! How can I help you today?
greeting.hi: Namaste! Main aapki kya madad kar sakta hoon?
